channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: On a installé Android 17 et voici nos 4 nouveautés préférées
item.description: Nous avons d'ores et déjà pu installer Android 17 sur un Pixel 9 de la rédaction. Après quelques heures d'usage, voici nos nouveautés favorites.

item.title: J’ai testé la Samsung Music Studio 7 : l’enceinte design qui veut tuer la barre de son
item.description: Pensée comme une enceinte design et connectée, cette « sculpture sonore » promet Dolby Atmos et multiroom. Utilisable seule ou jusqu’à quatre en synchronisation avec un TV Samsung, elle ambitionne de remplacer une barre de son. Voici ce qu'elle vaut à l'usage.

item.title: I tested 4 more 4K Blu-rays released in 2026 that are worth adding your collection — including a great Dolby Atmos showcase, and two sumptuous DTS music movies (well, one of them's Spinal Tap, but it absolutely counts)
item.description: It's Blu-ray's 20th anniversary, which gave me an excuse to lock myself in a room for a work day with 4 discs released in 2026 that I missed testing previously.

item.title: Claude Guillemot, one of Ubisoft's co-founders, has died in a plane crash
item.description: The crash reportedly happened on an airstrip near the western coast of France on June 19.

item.title: How to personalize the screensaver on your Kindle
item.description: Once you remove lockscreen ads and toggle on book covers, here's what else you can do to customize your Kindle's screensaver.

item.title: Eufy Omni S2 : cet aspirateur robot laveur ambitieux fait de l’ombre à Roborock avec sa station 12-en-1 et un prix en chute libre de 500 €
item.description: L'Anker Eufy Omni S2 est un robot aspirateur et laveur haut de gamme qui défie la concurrence avec sa puissance brute. Il se retrouve en promo en avant-première du Prime Day pour 1 099 euros au lieu de 1 599 euros.

item.title: Musician and YouTuber Hainbach on ‘Breath of the Wild’ and Swiss Army Knives
item.description: Stefan Paul Goetsch, better known as Hainbach, is a German experimental composer, artist, and YouTuber who is perhaps most famous for making music with laboratory equipment and scientific instruments. He describes it as being like the "Dark Souls of synthesis." Despite using "hard mode" production techniques that often rely on telephone line testing equipment and […]...

item.title: A great new lease of life for your old smartphone? Google teams up with university researchers to create low-cost data centers out of 2,000 old Pixel phones
item.description: Google and the University of California, San Diego transformed retired Pixel smartphones into computing clusters, exploring lower-cost data center alternatives while reducing electronic waste.

item.title: Every new iOS 27 feature that’s worth knowing about
item.description: While it's not flashy like Apple’s new Siri AI and Apple Intelligence upgrades, there are still a number of additions to iOS 27 worth looking at.

item.title: Apple’s new Child Safety features ‘don't get to where the harm is happening,’ online safety expert says — pushing responsibility to iPhone app developers poses a ‘huge risk’ to kids despite ‘genuine progress’
item.description: We spoke to SafeToNet CEO Richard Pursey about where Big Tech companies like Apple are still falling short when it comes to child safety.
